introduction.name: Tanush
introduction.headline: Backend Engineer
introduction.summary: I'm a backend-focused software engineer passionate about scalable systems, distributed architectures, and cloud infrastructure. I enjoy building resilient, well-structured services that support long-term maintainability and performance.
introduction.description: Outside of tech, I explore quantitative trading systems, algorithmic strategies, and personal finance automation. I also enjoy traveling and discovering new places. Experiencing different cultures and environments inspires me.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.company: CEI India Private Limited · subsidiary of CEI America
experience.summary: Leading backend and AI-platform work across QA automation, infrastructure, and internal tooling.
highlights: Led the end-to-end development of an AI-powered QA automation tool that improved manual QA efficiency by 70% and auto-generated 250+ test cases in under 45 minutes from screenshots and supporting documents.
Managed complete SDLC using Azure DevOps, resolved tickets independently, and handled sprint execution and code reviews.
Implemented Docker-based deployments with Nginx on production servers and automated build and deployment processes.
Set up an on-prem LLM server with load balancing, enabling secure, subscription-free access to LLMs across the organization.
Built a modular multi-agent architecture for scalable test generation with configurable output depth.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.company: CEI India Private Limited · subsidiary of CEI America
experience.summary: Built a strong foundation in AI agents, QA workflows, automation, and enterprise engineering practices.
highlights: Ramped up on AI agents, agentic system architecture, and multi-agent AI systems.
Applied SDLC, STLC, and Agile methodologies for effective collaboration and timely delivery.
Gained experience with source control, Azure DevOps, Microsoft Power Platform, RPA, and PowerShell automation.
Explored QA and testing practices including unit, automation, and performance testing techniques.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
experience.summary: Worked on data analysis and team-led delivery for an HR-focused data science project.
highlights: Led a team to complete a data science project addressing modern human resource challenges.
Applied Python, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn for analysis and visualization.
Managed tasks and timelines while strengthening hands-on collaboration and delivery discipline.

expertise.description: APIs, services, and production-ready backend design.
Deployment, containers, runtime infra, and cloud fundamentals.
CI/CD, architecture hygiene, and iterative execution.
Actively expanding backend and distributed systems stack.

projects.title: AI Code Generation Tool
projects.description: Enterprise internal platform that converts requirements into specs, generated code, and validation-ready test runs.
projects.summary: Built an internal AI coding workflow that reads requirements, drafts structured specs, generates implementation scaffolds, and validates output through automated checks before handoff.
highlights: Designed requirement-to-spec and spec-to-code orchestration flow for faster delivery.
Integrated internal AI testing tool to validate generated features via automated UI click flows on local deployments.
Focused on job management and context continuity to keep generated output traceable and review-friendly.

details.title: Problem
details.content: Teams needed a safer path from requirement notes to implementation-ready code without skipping specification quality.

details.title: What I Built
details.content: A workflow that analyzes requirements, generates structured specs, creates code drafts, and validates behavior through automated checks.

details.title: Engineering Value
details.content: Reduced manual back-and-forth and improved consistency by standardizing requirement parsing, context handling, and execution jobs.

projects.title: QA Automation Tool (Expansion & Infrastructure)
projects.description: Scaled internal QA automation system organization-wide with multi-agent execution depth, on-prem LLM infrastructure, and productionized delivery.
projects.summary: Expanded the QA automation platform for wider enterprise use, enabling rapid test generation from screenshots while improving reliability of AI execution through infra and architecture upgrades.
highlights: Enabled generation of 250+ test cases in ~45 minutes, reducing manual effort by ~70%.
Built configurable agent execution depth modes (Quick, Think, Deep Think) to match project complexity.
Configured secure on-prem LLM servers with Nginx load balancing and managed full SDLC in Azure DevOps.

details.title: Scale Goal
details.content: The team needed a dependable QA assistant that could serve multiple projects without high recurring subscription dependencies.

details.title: Architecture
details.content: Implemented a multi-agent pipeline with configurable depth and stronger context handling for higher-quality test generation.

details.title: Infrastructure
details.content: Set up on-prem LLM hosting with Nginx load balancing and Dockerized release flow to support secure internal adoption.

projects.title: QA Tool Prototype
projects.description: Initial prototype that proved the multi-agent QA approach and unlocked project funding.
projects.summary: Built the first end-to-end version of the QA automation concept during internship, validating feasibility and creating momentum for full-scale expansion.
highlights: Delivered initial prototype and core multi-agent flow that demonstrated practical value to stakeholders.
Created PowerShell and Power Platform scripts to speed up reporting and internal handoffs.
Applied Agile and CI/CD practices that led to immediate full-time conversion.

details.title: Outcome
details.content: Converted an early concept into a working prototype with demonstrable automation gains and reusable workflow pieces.

details.title: Prototype Scope
details.content: Focused on first-pass test generation, automation flow orchestration, and reporting scripts for internal reviewers.

projects.title: Predictive HR Analytics Project
projects.description: Team-delivered predictive analytics project under a strict timeline using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn.
projects.summary: Worked in a data team to build predictive HR analytics outputs, identify attrition drivers, and ship visual analysis under a tight 2-month delivery window.
highlights: Contributed to predictive modeling and feature analysis for HR attrition insights.
Prepared visualizations and narrative outputs for stakeholder-friendly interpretation.
Helped keep delivery on schedule within a strict internship timeline.

details.title: Problem
details.content: The project focused on identifying employee attrition patterns and improving decision visibility through data-backed insights.

details.title: Delivery
details.content: Used Python, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn workflows to build and communicate predictive trends within the committed timeline.

projects.title: RideShare Application
projects.description: A backend-led ride-sharing platform built around microservices, API orchestration, secure auth, Dockerized deployment, and AWS hosting.
projects.summary: Developed a fully functional RideShare application with real-time ride matching, secure authentication, and dynamic route optimization. The app is containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS EC2, leveraging S3 for static asset storage.
highlights: Led backend development for ride matching, users, and payments services.
Architected microservices with API Gateway and JWT-based security for centralized and trusted communication.
Containerized the full stack using Docker and deployed on AWS EC2 with S3 for static assets.
Owned planning and milestone execution while coordinating team delivery under a fixed timeline.

details.title: Problem
details.content: The goal was to build a modular ride-sharing backend that could evolve by feature without becoming tightly coupled across services.

details.title: Architecture
details.content: Designed dedicated microservices for ride matching, user management, and payments, with an API Gateway to unify routing and enforce consistent request handling.

details.title: Security & Auth
details.content: Implemented JWT-based authentication and protected API flows so user sessions and service calls remained secure across modules.

details.title: Deployment & Ops
details.content: Used Docker for containerization, deployed on AWS EC2, and integrated AWS S3 for static assets to keep the deployment path practical and cloud-ready.

details.title: Ownership
details.content: Led backend ownership, set milestones, coordinated collaboration, and ensured planned scope was delivered on schedule.

projects.title: Predictive Model of House Prices
projects.description: A housing-price prediction workflow that combines data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, Flask delivery, and cloud deployment.
projects.summary: Deployed a house price prediction model using a comprehensive data science pipeline and Flask application, fully integrated with AWS for scalability.
highlights: Structured data science pipeline from ingestion to prediction
User-facing Flask app for real-time predictions
AWS deployment for accessibility and scale

details.title: Pipeline Design
details.content: The project focused on clean preprocessing, feature preparation, training, evaluation, and exposing the model through a practical interface.

details.title: Deployment
details.content: The predictive workflow was deployed with AWS services so the application remained accessible and easier to maintain beyond local experimentation.

projects.title: Flask ToDo List
projects.description: A simple but clean task management app used to explore Dockerized full-stack setup with Flask and MongoDB.
projects.summary: Designed and containerized a Flask-based to-do list app using Docker for simplified deployment and modular scaling.
highlights: Persistent MongoDB-backed task storage
Multi-container setup with Docker Compose
Good example of maintainable container-first app structure

details.title: Core Flow
details.content: Users can add and remove tasks through a simple web UI while the Flask app handles server logic and MongoDB persists the data.

details.title: Containerization
details.content: The application and database run as separate containers, making the environment portable and repeatable across systems.

projects.title: Linear Regression Pairs Trading System
projects.description: A data-driven trading exploration using APIs, regression, and streamlined data transformation for market analysis.
projects.summary: Built a quantitative trading system around statistical arbitrage and mean-reversion concepts, using historical market relationships to generate data-backed trade signals with a reported 75% probability-of-profitability hit rate in backtesting runs.
highlights: Built a pairs-trading workflow grounded in stationarity and mean-reversion behavior.
Used regression and spread analysis to identify candidate entries and exits.
Automated data ingestion and transformation from API JSON payloads into analysis-ready datasets.
Achieved a 75% success rate in predicting probability of profitability during strategy evaluation.

details.title: Strategy Thesis
details.content: The system focused on statistical arbitrage by tracking historically related assets, modeling spread behavior, and targeting mean reversion for trade opportunities.

details.title: Data Pipeline
details.content: Built an automated ingestion path to collect market data from APIs and convert JSON payloads into clean CSV-style analysis inputs for repeatable experiments.

details.title: Signal Logic
details.content: Used regression-driven spread monitoring with rule-based entry and exit conditions to produce systematic, non-discretionary trading signals.

details.title: Evaluation
details.content: Backtesting and signal review showed a 75% success rate in probability-of-profitability predictions across evaluated windows.

details.title: Engineering Value
details.content: The project demonstrates end-to-end thinking across data engineering, statistical modeling, and practical system design for quant workflows.

projects.title: Digit Recognizer Using CNN
projects.description: A handwritten-digit recognition project built on CNN fundamentals and the MNIST dataset for practical OCR-style classification.
projects.summary: Handwritten digit recognition using CNNs and the MNIST dataset, achieving high accuracy for practical OCR applications.
highlights: CNN-based image classification workflow
MNIST-backed training and evaluation
Practical OCR-oriented thinking

details.title: Modeling
details.content: The model used convolutional neural network layers to learn spatial features from handwritten digits and classify them reliably.

details.title: Use Case
details.content: This project reflects applied interest in computer vision and OCR fundamentals, especially around robustness and input preprocessing.

projects.title: Data Preprocessing and PCA
projects.description: A dimensionality-reduction and regression study built around preprocessing quality, exploratory analysis, and principal components.
projects.summary: Vehicle dataset analysis using PCA and linear regression to explore dimensionality reduction and model performance.
highlights: Preprocessing and cleanup before modeling
PCA-driven dimensionality reduction
Model comparison for interpretability

details.title: Preprocessing
details.content: The work emphasized cleaning, transforming, and standardizing data before applying regression and PCA-based comparisons.

details.title: Analysis Goal
details.content: The project explores the trade-offs between simpler component-based models and richer original-feature models.

testimonials.author: Gouri Shankar Prusty P
testimonials.content: Tanush isn't just a colleague I respect, he's one of my closest friends from college, and we've known each other for over 4 years. From day one, I saw a spark in his curiosity, especially around finance and data science, and that passion has only grown stronger with time. His commitment to continuous learning is inspiring.

contact.availability: Open to backend, platform, AI tooling, and systems-focused opportunities.
